user_task_description: This inspection table is missing a Status column.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Insert a new Status column between Owner and Due Date while preserving the existing rows.
atomic_scope: Only the table structure change is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document with the requested table modification.

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The change is structural rather than textual
- Existing data must stay aligned with the right rows
- The insertion point matters, so appending at the end is not sufficient
